queries.question: show film and production cost ordered by production cost in ascending order
queries.sql: select title, Production_Cost from Films order by Production_Cost asc
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?production_cost WHERE {
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?films p:Production_Cost ?production_cost .
  ?films p:Production_Cost ?production_cost_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?production_cost_o)

queries.question: List the award-winning films and their production and marketing costs.
queries.sql: select Films.title, Films.Production_Cost, Marketing_Expense, count(*) Awards_Won from Films JOIN Awards on Awards.id = Films.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
SELECT ?t ?pc ?me (COUNT(?aw) AS ?n) WHERE { ?aw a :Awards ; p:hasFilms ?f . ?f a :Films ; p:title ?t ; p:Production_Cost ?pc ; p:Marketing_Expense ?me } GROUP BY ?f ?t ?pc ?me
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): gold join Awards.id=Films.id is buggy (should be filmId) + no GROUP BY; NL = per

queries.question: show film and marketing expense ordered by production cost in ascending order
queries.sql: select title, Marketing_Expense from Films order by Marketing_Expense asc
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?marketing_expense WHERE {
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?films p:Marketing_Expense ?marketing_expense .
  ?films p:Marketing_Expense ?marketing_expense_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?marketing_expense_o)

queries.question: List the award-winning films and their production costs.
queries.sql: select Films.title, Films.Production_Cost, count(*) Awards_Won from Films JOIN Awards on Awards.id = Films.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
SELECT ?t ?pc (COUNT(?aw) AS ?n) WHERE { ?aw a :Awards ; p:hasFilms ?f . ?f a :Films ; p:title ?t ; p:Production_Cost ?pc } GROUP BY ?f ?t ?pc
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): gold join buggy + no GROUP BY; NL = per-film production cost + #awards

queries.question: List the award-winning films and their marketing costs.

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>

queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): gold join buggy + no GROUP BY; NL = per-film marketing expense + #awards

queries.question: show film, production cost and marketing expense ordered by the production cost in ascending order and then by production cost in ascending order
queries.sql: select title, Production_Cost, Marketing_Expense from Films order by Production_Cost, Marketing_Expense asc
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?production_cost ?marketing_expense WHERE {
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?films p:Production_Cost ?production_cost .
  ?films p:Marketing_Expense ?marketing_expense .
  ?films p:Production_Cost ?production_cost_o .
  ?films p:Marketing_Expense ?marketing_expense_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?production_cost_o) ASC(?marketing_expense_o)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display a list of films, with the smallest budget first
Display films that have won awards, along with their budget
